blocks.text: Match preview: India Women face England Women in 11th Match (T20) on Wed, 10 Jun, 2026, 2:30 pm at Sophia Gardens Cardiff. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: ICC Womens T20 World Cup Warm-up Matches 2026

blocks.text: Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Light rain · High 16°C / Low 10°C · Rain: 6.7 mm · Wind: up to 23 km/h. Rain likely — DLS may apply; favour bowlers who hit the deck and teams with depth.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
